expectations.text: Establishes ordering: electrode group must exist before LFPSelection.insert1 can succeed
expectations.evidence: 'LFPElectrodeGroup must be populated before LFPSelection, because LFPSelection has a foreign key into it'; explicit FK constraint reasoning.

expectations.text: Explains the group is a reusable electrode bundle while the selection picks group + interval + filter for one populate run
expectations.evidence: 'LFPElectrodeGroup = what channels to ever consider together ... LFPSelection = compute LFP for this group on this interval with this filter, right now. One row per intended LFPV1.populate() job'.
